tasks.label: Backend: Stop port 8000
args: $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $expectedRoot=[System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $workspace 'backend')).ToLowerInvariant(); $foreign=@(); Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { $listenerPid=$_; $proc=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ('ProcessId = ' + $listenerPid) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $proc) { return }; $cmd=''; if ($proc.CommandLine) { $cmd=$proc.CommandLine.ToLowerInvariant() }; if (($cmd -like ('*' + $expectedRoot + '*')) -and (($cmd -like '*uvicorn*') -or ($cmd -like '*app.main:app*'))) { Stop-Process -Id $listenerPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { $foreign += $listenerPid } }; if ($foreign.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Port 8000 is already in use by non-Ugnay process(es): ' + (($foreign | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ', ')); exit 1 }; exit 0

tasks.label: Frontend: Stop port 3000
args: $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $expectedRoot=[System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $workspace 'frontend')).ToLowerInvariant(); $foreign=@(); Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { $listenerPid=$_; $proc=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ('ProcessId = ' + $listenerPid) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $proc) { return }; $cmd=''; if ($proc.CommandLine) { $cmd=$proc.CommandLine.ToLowerInvariant() }; if (($cmd -like ('*' + $expectedRoot + '*')) -and (($cmd -like '*next*dev*') -or ($cmd -like '*dev-clean.mjs*') -or ($cmd -like '*-p 3000*'))) { Stop-Process -Id $listenerPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { $foreign += $listenerPid } }; if ($foreign.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Port 3000 is already in use by non-Ugnay process(es): ' + (($foreign | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ', ')); exit 1 }; exit 0
